## **2.2.2.J. PI #10**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Based on figures from https://www.sesperformance.eu/dataportal - no breakdown available.

Neither Naviair or the NSA have this data available and have no plans to monitor this at local level but are using Eurocontrol numbers when available. Furthermore free route airspace is implemented.
